title: Wizards In Space
description: A kitchen sink modpack geared towards players who have an interest in magic or tech mods. Designed to be multiplayer compatible.
body:
Wizards in Space is a kitchen sink modpack that provides an experience for any kind of modded player. For those who love magic, we have staples such as Mana and Artifice, Enchanted: Bewitching, and Primal Magik. For those more interested in the tech side of things, we have Ad Astra, Create, the Thermal series, Draconic Evolution, Mekanism, and much, much more. This pack was designed with multiplayer in mind, so go out and explore this magical sci-fi adventure in together with friends.

(Note: this is still a work in progress, so expect some mild issues.)
